prompt_en: Drivers who have held a license for less than one year must display the novice driver sign, regardless of how confident they feel about their driving.
explanation_en: Drivers who have held a license for less than one year must display the novice driver sign, regardless of how confident they feel about their driving.
raw_text: Drivers who have held a license for less than one year must display the novice driver sign.

prompt_en: When a pedestrian is crossing at or near an intersection without a designated crosswalk, drivers must slow down, stop, or take other necessary precautions to avoid obstructing the pedestrian's crossing.
explanation_en: Drivers should remain mindful of pedestrians while operating their vehicles.
raw_text: When a pedestrian is crossing at or near an intersection without a designated crosswalk.

prompt_en: On national expressways, assuming a dry road surface and new tires, the recommended following distance at 100 km/h is approximately 100 meters.
explanation_en: This distance between vehicles is necessary to account for the stopping distance.
raw_text: On national expressways, the recommended following distance at 100 km/h is approximately 100 meters.

prompt_en: Drivers must always display the novice sign regardless of confidence.
explanation_en: The novice sign must be displayed by all new drivers.
raw_text: Drivers must always display the novice sign regardless of confidence.

prompt_en: Overtaking is prohibited on steep slopes.
explanation_en: Overtaking is allowed on steep uphill slopes because some vehicles cannot maintain the required speed.
raw_text: Overtaking is prohibited on steep slopes.

prompt_en: The stopping distance is 30 meters.
explanation_en: The stopping distance at certain speeds is 30 meters.
raw_text: The stopping distance is 30 meters.

prompt_en: A vehicle may stop for up to ten minutes on a road with less than 3.5 meters of clearance.
explanation_en: Drivers may park for loading or unloading cargo as long as they remain immediately available to drive.
raw_text: A vehicle may stop for up to ten minutes on a road with less than 3.5 meters of clearance.

prompt_en: When your vehicle is in an intersection and you notice an emergency vehicle is approaching from behind, you must stop there immediately.
explanation_en: You must not stop immediately. You must avoid intersection, move to the left and stop.
raw_text: When your vehicle is in an intersection and you notice an emergency vehicle is approaching from behind, you must stop there immediately.

prompt_en: When passing a railroad crossing where visibility is good or where there is a gateman, you just have to slow down.
explanation_en: Even if visibility is good or there is a gateman, you must stop before the railroad crossing.
raw_text: When passing a railroad crossing where visibility is good or where there is a gateman, you just have to slow down.

prompt_en: When you approach a pedestrian crossing and a pedestrian is crossing on it, you slow down and pass the pedestrian crossing while paying attention not to disturb the passage of the pedestrian.
explanation_en: When a pedestrian is crossing a pedestrian crossing, you must stop before the pedestrian crossing and yield to the pedestrian.
raw_text: When you approach a pedestrian crossing and a pedestrian is crossing on it.

prompt_en: When the surface of the roads changes, the braking distance will also change even in a same speed.
explanation_en: Correct
raw_text: When the surface of the roads changes, the braking distance will also change even in a same speed.

prompt_en: Drivers must always stop at railroad crossings regardless of visibility.
explanation_en: Drivers must always stop at railroad crossings.
raw_text: Drivers must always stop at railroad crossings regardless of visibility.

prompt_en: Drivers must always yield to pedestrians at crosswalks.
explanation_en: Drivers must always yield to pedestrians.

prompt_en: Drivers may stop at the intersection if permitted by the signal.
explanation_en: Drivers may stop at intersections when the signal allows.

prompt_en: Drivers must not park within 5 meters of a fire hydrant.
explanation_en: Parking near fire hydrants is prohibited.

prompt_en: Drivers are not allowed to park within 10 meters of a crosswalk.
explanation_en: Parking near crosswalks is prohibited.

prompt_en: Drivers must never exceed the speed limit even when overtaking.
explanation_en: Speed limits must always be observed.

prompt_en: Drivers must only use headlights at night.
explanation_en: Headlights should also be used in adverse conditions.

prompt_en: Drivers must check their blind spots before changing lanes.
explanation_en: Blind spot checks are essential for safe lane changes.

explanation_en: Signal timing is important for safety.
